title: OutroNinja's Forever Young
description: 🦊 Allows you to rename mobs to prevent them to grow.
body:
Forever Young 🍼

Forever Young keeps your baby mobs from ever growing up. Say goodbye to tantrums and awkward teenage years—they’ll stay adorable forever!

📌 About

Forever Young is a simple datapack that allows you to keep mobs in their baby forms forever. Just rename a baby mob using one of the following names: peter, baby, child, or alwaysyoung (all in lowercase).

⚡ Quick Overview

Tired of mobs growing up too fast? Forever Young will keep your little mobs young forever—because who wants to deal with teenage creepers anyway? Just a simple name tag, and they’ll stay tiny, cute, and (mostly) harmless. Forever!

🤔 F.A.Q.

  • Can I change the name after using the name tag without losing baby mode? Yes.
  • Is it possible to remove baby mode? No, not at the moment.
